life.Product Name: Official name of other insurance product
life.Coverage Term: How long the policy provides coverage
life.Min. Premium: Minimum annual or monthly premium amount
life.Cash Value: Savings/investment portion of the policy that builds up over time
life.Convertible: Can convert to another plan without evidence of insurability
life.Renewable: Policy can be renewed at end of term
life.TPD: Total Permanent Disability coverage age limit
life.Critical Illness Accelerated: CI benefit paid upfront but deducted from your sum assured
life.Critical Illness Additional: CI benefit paid on top of sum assured (not deducted)
life.Critical Illness Payor/Waiver: Waives future premiums if CI is diagnosed
life.Hospitalisation (Deductible <=500): Hospital rider with deductible up to 500
life.Hospitalisation (Deductible >=500): Hospital rider with deductible 500 or more
life.Female Cover: Specific coverage for female conditions (pregnancy, female cancers)

critical_illness.Coverage Term / Max Age: How long the policy provides coverage
critical_illness.Critical Illness Accelerated: CI benefit paid upfront but deducted from your sum assured
critical_illness.Critical Illness Additional: CI benefit paid on top of sum assured (not deducted)
critical_illness.Critical Illness Payor/Waiver: Waives future premiums if CI is diagnosed
critical_illness.Hospitalisation (Deductible <=500): Hospital rider with deductible up to 500
critical_illness.Hospitalisation (Deductible >=500): Hospital rider with deductible 500 or more

medical.Room & Board: Daily room and board benefit limit
medical.Deductible / Co-Insurance: Amount policyholder pays before claim and percentage shared
medical.Key Features: Unique selling points (e.g., no co-pay, overseas coverage)
medical.Critical Illness Accelerated: CI benefit paid upfront but deducted from your sum assured
medical.Critical Illness Additional: CI benefit paid on top of sum assured (not deducted)
medical.Critical Illness Payor/Waiver: Waives future premiums if CI is diagnosed
medical.Female Cover: Maternity, female cancer, or pregnancy cover

savings_endowment_retirement.Premium Term: How many years premiums are paid
savings_endowment_retirement.Coverage Period: How long the policy provides coverage
savings_endowment_retirement.Critical Illness Accelerated: CI benefit paid upfront but deducted from your sum assured
savings_endowment_retirement.Critical Illness Additional: CI benefit paid on top of sum assured (not deducted)
savings_endowment_retirement.Critical Illness Payor/Waiver: Waives future premiums if CI is diagnosed
savings_endowment_retirement.Hospitalisation (Deductible = 0): Optional hospital rider with zero deductible
savings_endowment_retirement.Hospitalisation (Deductible <=500): Optional hospital rider with deductible up to 500
savings_endowment_retirement.Hospitalisation (Deductible >=500): Optional hospital rider with deductible 500 or more

others.Insurance Type: e.g., Personal accident, PA, travel, disability
others.Coverage Period: How long the policy provides coverage
others.Critical Illness Accelerated: CI benefit paid upfront but deducted from your sum assured
others.Critical Illness Additional: CI benefit paid on top of sum assured (not deducted)
others.Critical Illness Payor/Waiver: Waives future premiums if CI is diagnosed
others.Hospitalisation (Deductible <=500): Hospital rider with deductible up to 500
others.Hospitalisation (Deductible >=500): Hospital rider with deductible 500 or more
